mean_cn: n.用X射线进行的临床检查
mean_en: a type of radiation that can pass through objects that are not transparent and make it possible to see inside or through them; a photograph made by X-rays, especially one showing bones or organs in the body
sentence: X-rays allow the doctor to know what is happening to the patient.
sentence_trans: X光检查可以让医生知道病人的情况。
word_etyma: X未知量的代数符号 + ray射线 → X-ray x射线
